metadata.title: Remote work in Oaxaca | Atzomx Coworking
metadata.description: Local coworking with 1000 Mbps fiber in downtown Oaxaca. Flexible plans and specialty coffee for freelancers and professionals.

banner.title: Remote work in Oaxaca
banner.subtitle: A local coworking space with dedicated fiber and specialty coffee — for people who live here and visitors who respect the neighborhood.

problem.title: Infrastructure for your workday
problem.lead: More freelancers, creatives, and professionals work online in Oaxaca every year — locals and people passing through. Atzomx is a space built here: stable fiber, a professional setting, and a calm atmosphere in the city center.
problem.context: The UTC-6 timezone makes it easier to coordinate with teams in Mexico and North America. If you need a fixed place outside home for video calls or deep focus, we offer hourly, daily, and monthly plans — with published rates and no surprises.
problem.solution: Home connections don't always hold up for an important call or a deadline. Atzomx's 1000 Mbps fiber is work infrastructure — not a travel shortcut.

localValues.title: Showing up with respect
localValues.lead: Atzomx started in Oaxaca, and most people who use the space live in the city. If you're visiting, treat the Historic Center as a lived-in neighborhood — not a backdrop: shop locally, care for public space, and listen to people who have been here for years.
localValues.note: We believe coworking adds value when it creates local jobs, buys from regional suppliers, and shares the block with neighbors and businesses.

workflow.title: At home or at Atzomx — whatever you need
workflow.subtitle: Many people alternate between their own space and coworking — without relying on just one for the whole day.

async.title: Tasks in your space
async.description: Email, docs, and async work wherever suits you.

focus.title: Calls and focus here
focus.description: Video calls, demos, and deliverables with dedicated fiber and a professional setting.

community.title: Community in the space
community.description: Local freelancers, creatives, and short-term visitors — sharing tables with mutual respect.

highlights.title: Built for focused work
highlights.subtitle: Infrastructure and atmosphere for freelancers, small teams, and independent professionals — wherever you're from.

wifi.title: 1000 Mbps fiber
wifi.description: Dedicated internet for calls, demos, and heavy uploads — when home connection isn't enough.

timezone.title: UTC-6
timezone.description: Easier coordination with teams in Mexico and the US East Coast.

location.title: Walkable center
location.description: Los Libres 800-B, minutes from the Zócalo — in the same neighborhood where we've operated from the start.

amenities.title: What you need for a good workday

spacePreview.title: A workspace in the city center
spacePreview.subtitle: Spacious desks, natural light, and specialty coffee steps away.

testimonials.title: What people who work here say

cta.title: Book your spot
cta.description: Message us on WhatsApp for hourly, daily, or monthly plans. In high season, booking ahead is recommended.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'm looking for coworking space at Atzomx in Oaxaca.
